things.name: Galle Fort Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century Dutch fort-town — rampart walks, boutique hotels and cricket on the grounds

things.name: Gangaramaya Temple
things.description: Eclectic Buddhist temple on Beira Lake — mix of Thai, Indian, Chinese and Sri Lankan architecture

things.name: Pettah Floating Market
things.description: Vibrant canal market area in Colombo's oldest bazaar district — spices, fabrics and street food

things.name: National Museum of Colombo
things.description: Sri Lanka's largest museum with the Kandyan royal throne, gem collection and ancient Sinhalese artefacts

things.name: Negombo Beach
things.description: Laid-back beach town just north of the airport — good seafood, canals and a lagoon full of fish

things.name: Lotus Tower
things.description: South Asia's tallest tower at 356 m — observation deck with views across Colombo and the ocean

things.name: Galle Face Green
things.description: Historic ocean promenade where families fly kites and eat deep-fried snacks at sunset

things.name: Dambulla Cave Temple Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage cave temple with 150 Buddha statues and magnificent ceiling frescoes

things.name: Dutch Hospital Shopping Precinct
things.description: Restored 17th-century Dutch hospital transformed into Colombo's most atmospheric dining and shopping hub

things.name: Sri Dalada Maligawa (Temple of the Tooth)
things.description: Kandy's sacred Buddhist temple housing a relic of the Buddha's tooth — 3 hours from Colombo by train
